title: Cloud Security Engineer
description: CipherShield provides managed security services to FTSE 100 companies. We're looking for a Cloud Security Engineer to join our red team and help clients harden their AWS and Azure environments. You'll conduct cloud security assessments, build detection rules, and advise on Zero Trust architecture.
responsibilities: Conduct cloud security assessments for enterprise clients
Build and tune SIEM detection rules for cloud threats
Produce executive-level security reports and remediation roadmaps
